message:
fix(mobile): let SequenceView manage its own height on mobile

Defers height calculation to SequenceView component on mobile:

Before: App.tsx calculated sequenceHeight for all screen sizes
After: Returns undefined for mobile, letting SequenceView handle it

This ensures consistent height calculation in one place, where
SequenceView already accounts for:
- Control deck height (portrait vs landscape)
- Safe area insets
- Dynamic viewport height (dvh)

Tablet and desktop continue using App.tsx calculations:
- Narrow/tablet: viewport-based calc
- Desktop: clamp(500px, 70vh, 1000px)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
